contract.promotion_requirement: fixed-direct and loss-direct heldout continuations must both hit before pair-probe promotion
contract.leakage_policy: use task-id and paired-block descriptions, but never train on exact heldout direct or pair probes
contract.source_route_boundary: created after light capacity probe matched fixed-recovery without recovering loss
contract.patch_note: bridge rows expose raw fixed= and loss= surfaces while preserving heldout pair probe isolation

added_rows: bridge fixed raw surface fixed= produces fixed
direct prompt fixed= should continue with fixed
bridge loss raw surface loss= produces loss
direct prompt loss= should continue with loss
patch.patch_focus: raw fixed= and loss= direct prompt bridge without adding the heldout pair probe

check_rows.detail: bridge patch follows only a detected direct surface mismatch
base must be the objective-structure contract
all direct prompt bridge rows must be present
fixed bridge rows must be balanced
loss bridge rows must be balanced
exact eval prompts must not be training rows
heldout pair probe must stay out of training rows

interpretation.reason: The patched contract now includes raw fixed= and loss= bridge rows while keeping the pair heldout probe isolated.
interpretation.next_action: materialize the direct-prompt bridge contract and rerun pair-readiness training
